MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion for Extension of Jurisdiction of Arbitrator is scheduled today. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. The Arbitrator's jurisdiction is extended to 12/19/2002. The Arbitration OSC is re-set to 1/16/2003 at 1:30 PM, in department 212. Order signed by court.
